candidates.why: This is the explicit top-line revenue figure; matches definition of total revenue/sales and precedes cost of sales and gross profit.
This is a cost line, not revenue; should not be used for REVT.
Despite wording, numeric values match cost of sales, so this is cost, not revenue.
Balancing adjustment for cost of sales, not revenue.

variables.notes: Single clear revenue line; other candidates are cost-related and inappropriate for REVT.

candidates.why: Primary cost of goods sold / cost of sales line with substantial values; best representation of COGS.
Appears with no recent numeric values; likely an unused or legacy mapping for the same concept, but less reliable than populated 'Cost of sales'.
Explicitly a balancing adjustment line; should not be used as main COGS measure.
Duplicate total of cost of sales; labelled as a total so less preferred than the base 'Cost of sales' line per instructions.

variables.notes: Uses the main populated cost of sales line; avoids totals and balancing items per rules.

candidates.why: Operating overhead component (not a total, not COGS, not D&A); fits SG&A bucket.
Overhead/general expense component; appropriate SG&A element.
Personnel-related overhead cost; appropriate SG&A component even if preview values are empty.

variables.notes: No single explicit SG&A total; these three are clear overhead components and none are totals or balancing items, matching SG&A definition.
No R&D-related row appears in the candidate list; treat XRD as zero per instructions.

candidates.why: Direct interest expense on loans; primary interest expense line and best fit for XINT.
Interest component of lease liabilities; also an interest expense and useful fallback if loan interest missing.
Represents allocation of profit, not interest; not suitable for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Of which non-controlling ownership interests Earnings per share
candidates.why: EPS-related disclosure for NCI, not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest expense; good additional fallback for interest cost.
Balance sheet liability, not an expense; should not be used for XINT.
Long-term debt balance, not an expense line.
Another label for debt principal; not an income statement interest expense.
Equity attributable to non-controlling interests; unrelated to interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Priority list of true interest expense lines; balance sheet debt and NCI-related rows are excluded.

candidates.why: Line exists but appears unused/empty; too narrow and not total equity.
Represents total shareholders’ equity; matches book equity definition and equals Total Assets - Total Liabilities.
Explicitly a balancing item, not the reported equity figure; should be avoided.
Balancing line; not the primary reported equity.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Technical balancing row; not appropriate for BE.
Represents total assets/LI+E, not equity alone; unsuitable for BE.

variables.notes: Uses the main total Equity line as book equity; avoids balancing and aggregate LI+E totals.

candidates.why: Income attribution to NCI; income statement item, not the equity balance itself.

candidates.row_label: Of which non-controlling ownership interests Earnings per share
candidates.why: EPS detail for NCI; not the minority interest balance.
Balance sheet line for non-controlling interests in equity; matches MIB definition.

variables.notes: Selects the balance sheet Minority Interest as the MIB equity component; income statement NCI rows are not equity balances.
